prestazioni: Engine: AJ-V8 Gen III 5.0L Supercharged (PT500) with a custom TTE800 hybrid supercharger upgrade (replacing the stock Eaton TVS R1900), increasing boost from 0.95 bar to 1.4 bar, paired with a bespoke Motec M150 ECU remap for 700+ HP and 650 lb-ft torque on 100-octane fuel, utilizing forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (9.5:1 compression) and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods

Drivetrain: Quaife ATB LSD (QDF7Z) with a 3.73:1 final drive ratio swap (replacing the stock 3.31:1) and a Tilton twin-plate carbon clutch (7.25" diameter) for improved power transfer, paired with a Pankl Racing Systems 8-speed ZF 8HP75 transmission with reinforced internals and a custom TCU tune by Dimsport

Suspension & Handling: Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression), custom-valved for the Project 8’s aluminum-intensive chassis, paired with Eibach ERS 1000N/mm front and 1200N/mm rear springs, and a full polygraphite bushings kit from SuperPro (part #SPF0115K) for subframe and control arm reinforcement
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion by Prior Design (PD-XE8 kit), including extended front fenders (30mm per side), rear quarter panels (40mm per side), and a custom 3D-printed carbon diffuser with integrated Gurney flap, reducing lift by 40% at 150 mph

Exterior: Custom matte British Racing Green (Jaguar Heritage code 18G) wrap with satin gold accents on the front splitter, side skirts, and rear wing, paired with a full de-chrome treatment (blacked-out badges, window trim, and grille) and a custom laser-etched Project 8 badge on the C-pillars by Vinyl Wrap UK

Wheels & Brakes: Forged 20" x 9.5" (front) and 20" x 11" (rear) Rotiform LAS-R wheels in Satin Black with gold accents, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/30 R20 front, 295/25 R20 rear), paired with AP Racing CP9660 carbon-ceramic brakes (400mm front, 380mm rear) with gold calipers and custom Project 8 laser-etched rotors
